title: BUbuisnessAndMarket
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbuisnessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: U.S. Olympians earn just 5% of what Singapore pays—many are forced to juggle jobs as baristas, brokers, and dentists just to get by
items.description: Most Olympians don’t bring home a major paycheck for their sport.

items.title: China claims the Hong Konger just sentenced to 20 years in prison is Chinese. The UK begs to differ
items.description: The British government said it is expanding an immigration route to more residents of Hong Kong, with tens of thousands estimated to be immigrating.

items.title: Republican elite in Georgia still roiled by collapse of $140 million Ponzi scheme, 7 months later
items.description: “We feel like we’re never going to see it, as old as we are," Thomas Todd, a 77-year-old retired business owner.

items.title: Chinese shoppers can’t get enough of Disney’s Zootopia and Ralph Lauren’s ‘old money’ look despite nationalistic vibes
items.description: Chinese brands dubbed “guochao,” or national tide, sit side by side with American brands in mainland retail stores.

items.title: Jimmy Lai’s children beseech Trump to argue for media mogul’s release in upcoming Beijing visit
items.description: “The president has said multiple times that this is a case that he cares about,” Sebastien Lai said about Trump during a call with reporters.
